caption:
Suno's training data is out in the open — and it's a long list of platforms that didn't sign off. YouTube, Deezer, Genius: millions of songs, scraped without disclosed consent. The fair use debate in AI music just got a lot more concrete. 🎵

#AIMusic #Suno #CreatorRights #AITrainingData #MusicIndustry

story.title: Suno trained on millions of scraped songs from YouTube, Deezer, Genius
story.dek: Leaked data reveals the AI music generator sourced training material from major platforms without disclosed consent, raising fair use questions for creators and platforms.
